name: Fluffy Marshmallow Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the marshmallows and milk over boiling water and stir until the marshmallows are melted.
2. Remove from heat, add vanilla, and cool.
3. When chilled and beginning to thicken, fold in whipped cream until thick but not stiff.
4. Freeze. Adding two squares of melted chocolate to the hot mixture creates a pleasing variation.
5. Makes 2 quarts.
